repos.name: music-assistant/server
repos.desc: Music Assistant is a free, opensource Media library manager that connects to your streaming services and a wide range of connected speakers. The server is the beating heart, the core of Music Assistant and must run on an always-on device like a Raspberry Pi, a NAS or an Intel NUC or alike.

repos.name: Universal-Debloater-Alliance/universal-android-debloater-next-generation
repos.desc: Cross-platform GUI written in Rust using ADB to debloat non-rooted Android devices. Improve your privacy, the security and battery life of your device.

# 🐼 GitHub 趋势速递 2026-06-17：13 个项目今天值得你 star

> 📅 2026-06-17  |  🔍 共收录 13 个热门项目

又到了一天一度的「看看别人在卷什么」环节。准备好你的 star 键，Let's go 🚀

---

## 📊 今日统计

主力语言：**TypeScript**: 6 | **Rust**: 3 | **Python**: 2 | **Elixir**: 1 | **C++**: 1

> TypeScript 项目上榜。类型安全的快乐，只有写过 any 的人才能体会。
